faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Tqdr Plus

questions.a: It is a platform that allows customers to get discounts when prepaying to shops, and allows shops to manage their customers and increase their loyalty.

questions.q: How do I ensure my rights?
questions.a: All transactions are documented and you receive instant SMS messages for every charge or discount process.
Yes, the service is completely free for customers, and provides flexible packages for shop owners.

questions.q: How does the seller know I have a balance?
questions.a: Give them your registered mobile number, and after the discount, you will receive an SMS with the deducted amount and the new balance immediately.

questions.q: What happens if my balance runs out?
questions.a: Simply, you can recharge a new balance at any time to continue benefiting from exclusive discounts.
